raw_title: Scanning vs. Thorough Processing the News: Antecedents of First- and Second-Level Incidental Exposure and the Role of the Relevance Appraisal
title_en: Scanning vs. Thorough Processing the News: Antecedents of First- and Second-Level Incidental Exposure and the Role of the Relevance Appraisal
title_zh: 新闻浏览与深度处理：第一级和第二级偶然暴露的前因及相关性评估的作用
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何偶然接触到新闻，区分了快速浏览和深度处理两种方式。它研究了导致这种偶然暴露的因素，以及人们如何评估新闻的相关性。研究关注数字新闻环境中的信息获取行为。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people accidentally encounter news, distinguishing between quick scanning and thorough processing. It investigates what leads to this incidental exposure and how people judge the relevance of news. The research focuses on information-seeking behaviors in digital news environments.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中的信息处理与媒体效果研究，关注偶然信息暴露的心理机制和行为模式。
research_direction_en: Research on information processing and media effects in digital journalism, focusing on psychological mechanisms and behavioral patterns of incidental information exposure.
